generated_comment: Yaar, that new team lead, Priya? Impressive growth, no doubt. But honestly, I wonder sometimes if these 'diversity hires' actually deliver the same. Just saying.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment undermines a woman's promotion by subtly attributing it to a 'diversity hire' rather than pure merit, reflecting the core belief that women in leadership may not have earned their position fairly. It encodes the 'merit undermining' surface manifestation, framed as a casual observation.
original_frame: Workplace: Menstrual and Maternity Leave Bias
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 23. A fresher at an e-commerce startup in Delhi. You are in your company's unofficial male only WhatsApp group created by colleagues for after-hours chat. Someone just shared a meme making fun of the new period leave policy. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment.
